regexCodeList.string: ^You see your own dead body from above\.$
^Questor exclaims 'Make sure to unkeep anything you're going to remort auction!'$
^You place an? ([A-Za-z]{1,5}) totem in the room\.$
^<> Your totem has been killed by ([A-Za-z]{3,12})\.$
^Your eye of vigilance has closed for the last time\.$
^You remove your eye of vigilance from (.*)\.$

Script.name: HSP_Main_Script
Script.script:
-- ============================================================================ -- Hadar_Spellup_Caster for Mudlet -- Ported from MUSHclient plugin by Hadar -- Version: 1.16 -- Purpose: Spellup Script for Aardwolf MUD -- ============================================================================
HSP = HSP or {} HSP.version = "1.16" HSP.pluginName = "Hadar_Spellup_Caster" local function hsp_persistence_dir() local home = (type(getMudletHomeDir) == "function" and getMudletHomeDir() or ".") local dir = home .. "/persistence" if type(mkdir) == "function" then pcall(mkdir, dir) end if type(lfs) == "table" and type(lfs.mkdir) == "function" then pcall(lfs.mkdir, dir) end return dir end HSP.savefile = hsp_persistence_dir() .. "/hadar_spellups.lua" HSP.timerIDs = HSP.timerIDs or {} HSP.currentState = -1 HSP.maxmana = -1 HSP.currentmana = -1 HSP.slistCommandSent = false HSP.pluscount = 0 HSP.pluscount2 = 0 Spellups = Spellups or {}
-- ============================================================================ -- Xterm 256-color to RGB lookup (for cecho) -- ============================================================================ HSP.xterm256 = { [0]="0,0,0",[1]="128,0,0",[2]="0,128,0",[3]="128,128,0", [4]="0,0,128",[5]="128,0,128",[6]="0,128,128",[7]="192,192,192", [8]="128,128,128",[9]="255,0,0",[10]="0,255,0",[11]="255,255,0", [12]="0,0,255",[13]="255,0,255",[14]="0,255,255",[15]="255,255,255", [16]="0,0,0",[17]="0,0,95",[18]="0,0,135",[19]="0,0,175", [20]="0,0,215",[21]="0,0,255",[22]="0,95,0",[23]="0,95,95", [24]="0,95,135",[25]="0,95,175",[26]="0,95,215",[27]="0,95,255", [28]="0,135,0",[29]="0,135,95",[30]="0,135,135",[31]="0,135,175", [32]="0,135,215",[33]="0,135,255",[34]="0,175,0",[35]="0,175,95", [36]="0,175,135",[37]="0,175,175",[38]="0,175,215",[39]="0,175,255", [40]="0,215,0",[41]="0,215,95",[42]="0,215,135",[43]="0,215,175", [44]="0,215,215",[45]="0,215,255",[46]="0,255,0",[47]="0,255,95", [48]="0,255,135",[49]="0,255,175",[50]="0,255,215",[51]="0,255,255", [52]="95,0,0",[53]="95,0,95",[54]="95,0,135",[55]="95,0,175", [56]="95,0,215",[57]="95,0,255",[58]="95,95,0",[59]="95,95,95", [60]="95,95,135",[61]="95,95,175",[62]="95,95,215",[63]="95,95,255", [64]="95,135,0",[65]="95,135,95",[66]="95,135,135",[67]="95,135,175", [68]="95,135,215",[69]="95,135,255",[70]="95,175,0",[71]="95,175,95", [72]="95,175,135",[73]="95,175,175",[74]="95,175,215",[75]="95,175,255", [76]="95,215,0",[77]="95,215,95",[78]="95,215,135",[79]="95,215,175", [80]="95,215,215",[81]="95,215,255",[82]="95,255,0",[83]="95,255,95", [84]="95,255,135",[85]="95,255,175",[86]="95,255,215",[87]="95,255,255", [88]="135,0,0",[89]="135,0,95",[90]="135,0,135",[91]="135,0,175", [92]="135,0,215",[93]="135,0,255",[94]="135,95,0",[95]="135,95,95", [96]="135,95,135",[97]="135,95,175",[98]="135,95,215",[99]="135,95,255", [100]="135,135,0",[101]="135,135,95",[102]="135,135,135",[103]="135,135,175", [104]="135,135,215",[105]="135,135,255",[106]="135,175,0",[107]="135,175,95", [108]="135,175,135",[109]="135,175,175",[110]="135,175,215",[111]="135,175,255", [112]="135,215,0",[113]="135,215,95",[114]="135,215,135",[115]="135,215,175", [116]="135,215,215",[117]="135,215,255",[118]="135,255,0",[119]="135,255,95", [120]="135,255,135",[121]="135,255,175",[122]="135,255,215",[123]="135,255,255", [124]="175,0,0",[125]="175,0,95",[126]="175,0,135",[127]="175,0,175", [128]="175,0,215",[129]="175,0,255",[130]="175,95,0",[131]="175,95,95", [132]="175,95,135",[133]="175,95,175",[134]="175,95,215",[135]="175,95,255", [136]="175,135,0",[137]="175,135,95",[138]="175,135,135",[139]="175,135,175", [140]="175,135,215",[141]="175,135,255",[142]="175,175,0",[143]="175,175,95", [144]="175,175,135",[145]="175,175,175",[146]="175,175,215",[147]="175,175,255", [148]="175,215,0",[149]="175,215,95",[150]="175,215,135",[151]="175,215,175", [152]="175,215,215",[153]="175,215,255",[154]="175,255,0",[155]="175,255,95", [156]="175,255,135",[157]="175,255,175",[158]="175,255,215",[159]="175,255,255", [160]="215,0,0",[161]="215,0,95",[162]="215,0,135",[163]="215,0,175", [164]="215,0,215",[165]="215,0,255",[166]="215,95,0",[167]="215,95,95", [168]="215,95,135",[169]="215,95,175",[170]="215,95,215",[171]="215,95,255", [172]="215,135,0",[173]="215,135,95",[174]="215,135,135",[175]="215,135,175", [176]="215,135,215",[177]="215,135,255",[178]="215,175,0",[179]="215,175,95", [180]="215,175,135",[181]="215,175,175",[182]="215,175,215",[183]="215,175,255", [184]="215,215,0",[185]="215,215,95",[186]="215,215,135",[187]="215,215,175", [188]="215,215,215",[189]="215,215,255",[190]="215,255,0",[191]="215,255,95", [192]="215,255,135",[193]="215,255,175",[194]="215,255,215",[195]="215,255,255", [196]="255,0,0",[197]="255,0,95",[198]="255,0,135",[199]="255,0,175", [200]="255,0,215",[201]="255,0,255",[202]="255,95,0",[203]="255,95,95", [204]="255,95,135",[205]="255,95,175",[206]="255,95,215",[207]="255,95,255", [208]="255,135,0",[209]="255,135,95",[210]="255,135,135",[211]="255,135,175", [212]="255,135,215",[213]="255,135,255",[214]="255,175,0",[215]="255,175,95", [216]="255,175,135",[217]="255,175,175",[218]="255,175,215",[219]="255,175,255", [220]="255,215,0",[221]="255,215,95",[222]="255,215,135",[223]="255,215,175", [224]="255,215,215",[225]="255,215,255",[226]="255,255,0",[227]="255,255,95", [228]="255,255,135",[229]="255,255,175",[230]="255,255,215",[231]="255,255,255", [232]="8,8,8",[233]="18,18,18",[234]="28,28,28",[235]="38,38,38", [236]="48,48,48",[237]="58,58,58",[238]="68,68,68",[239]="78,78,78", [240]="88,88,88",[241]="98,98,98",[242]="108,108,108",[243]="118,118,118", [244]="128,128,128",[245]="138,138,138",[246]="148,148,148",[247]="158,158,158", [248]="168,168,168",[249]="178,178,178",[250]="188,188,188",[251]="198,198,198", [252]="208,208,208",[253]="218,218,218",[254]="228,228,228",[255]="238,238,238", }
-- ============================================================================ -- Convert Aardwolf @color codes to Mudlet cecho format -- ============================================================================ function HSP.ColoursToMudlet(str) if not str then return "" end str = tostring(str) -- Map basic Aardwolf color codes to cecho color names local colorMap = { ["@r"] = "<ansiRed>", ["@R"] = "<ansiLightRed>", ["@g"] = "<ansiGreen>", ["@G"] = "<ansiLightGreen>", ["@b"] = "<ansiBlue>", ["@B"] = "<ansiLightBlue>", ["@c"] = "<ansiCyan>", ["@C"] = "<ansiLightCyan>", ["@y"] = "<ansiYellow>", ["@Y"] = "<ansiLightYellow>", ["@m"] = "<ansiMagenta>", ["@M"] = "<ansiLightMagenta>", ["@w"] = "<ansiWhite>", ["@W"] = "<white>", ["@D"] = "<ansiLightBlack>", } -- First handle xterm @x### and @X### codes str = str:gsub("@[xX](%d%d%d)", function(num) local n = tonumber(num) if HSP.xterm256[n] then return "<" .. HSP.xterm256[n] .. ">" end return "" end) str = str:gsub("@[xX](%d%d)", function(num) local n = tonumber(num) if HSP.xterm256[n] then return "<" .. HSP.xterm256[n] .. ">" end return "" end) -- Then handle basic color codes for code, replacement in pairs(colorMap) do str = str:gsub(code:gsub("@", "@"), replacement) end -- Handle @@ as literal @ str = str:gsub("@@", "@") return str end
-- ============================================================================ -- hadarprint - main output function (adapted from MUSHclient) -- ============================================================================ function hadarprint(str, level) if not str then str = "" end
if level == "debug" then if Spellups["GL"] and Spellups["GL"]["Debug"] == "yes" then cecho("<ansiLightGreen>[<ansiLightYellow>HSP DEBUG<ansiLightGreen>]<white>:<ansiWhite>" .. HSP.ColoursToMudlet(str) .. "<reset>\n") end elseif level == "error" then cecho("<ansiLightRed>[<ansiLightMagenta>hsp <ansiRed>ERROR<ansiLightRed>]<white>:<ansiWhite>" .. HSP.ColoursToMudlet(str) .. "<reset>\n") elseif level == "script" then if type(str) == "table" then display(str) else cecho("<ansiLightGreen>[<ansiLightCyan>S<ansiCyan>pellup<ansiLightGreen>]<ansiCyan> " .. HSP.ColoursToMudlet(str) .. "<reset>\n") end elseif level == "helpfile" or level == "helpfile2" then cecho(str .. "\n") elseif level == "noclan" then cecho("<ansiLightGreen>[<255,175,0>hsp <ansiLightYellow>NO CLAN<ansiLightGreen>]<white>:<ansiWhite>" .. HSP.ColoursToMudlet(str) .. "<reset>\n") else cecho(HSP.ColoursToMudlet(str) .. "<reset>\n") end end
-- ============================================================================ -- Utility: string interpolation (adapted) -- ============================================================================ function interp(s, tab) if s == nil then hadarprint("<ansiLightRed>You forgot to fill in a message please use <ansiLightCyan>hsp help<ansiLightRed> and run the message commands to see which one.") return "" else return (s:gsub('($%b{})', function(w) return tab[w:sub(3, -2)] or w end)) end end
-- ============================================================================ -- Utility: table helpers (adapted from MUSHclient) -- ============================================================================ function table.find(val, tbl) tbl = tbl or {} if (tbl[val] ~= nil) then return tbl[val] end return nil end
function table.count(tbl) tbl = tbl or {} local tblcount = 0 for i,v in pairs(tbl) do tblcount = tblcount + 1 end return tblcount end
function contains(tableToSearch, value) if not tableToSearch then return false end for i,v in ipairs(tableToSearch) do if (v == value) then return true end end return false end
function remove(tableToSearch, value) for i,v in ipairs(tableToSearch) do if (v == value) then table.remove(tableToSearch, i) return end end end
-- ============================================================================ -- Utility: split string -- ============================================================================ function HSP.split(str, sep, max) local parts = {} local count = 0 for part in str:gmatch("[^" .. (sep or "%s") .. "]+") do count = count + 1 if max and count >= max then parts[count] = str:sub(str:find(part, 1, true)) break end parts[count] = part end return parts end
-- ============================================================================ -- GMCP helper - access nested GMCP data by dot path -- ============================================================================ function HSP.gmcpval(path) local parts = HSP.split(path, ".") local current = gmcp for _, part in ipairs(parts) do if current == nil then return nil end current = current[part] end return current end
-- ============================================================================ -- State persistence (replaces MUSHclient GetVariable/SetVariable/SaveState) -- ============================================================================ function HSP.SaveState() Spellups["GL"]["initilized"] = "yes" table.save(HSP.savefile, Spellups) end
function HSP.LoadState() if io.open(HSP.savefile, "r") then table.load(HSP.savefile, Spellups) return true end return false end
-- ============================================================================ -- Timer management (replaces MUSHclient AddTimer/DeleteTimer) -- ============================================================================ function HSP.AddNamedTimer(name, hours, minutes, seconds, callback_name) HSP.DeleteNamedTimer(name) local total_secs = (hours or 0) * 3600 + (minutes or 0) * 60 + (seconds or 0) if total_secs <= 0 then return end HSP.timerIDs[name] = tempTimer(total_secs, function() HSP.timerIDs[name] = nil if _G[callback_name] then _G[callback_name](name) end end) end
function HSP.DeleteNamedTimer(name) if HSP.timerIDs[name] then killTimer(HSP.timerIDs[name]) HSP.timerIDs[name] = nil end end
-- ============================================================================ -- SendSpecial replacement - sends a command to MUD via channel -- ============================================================================ function HSP.SendSpecial(cmd) send(cmd) end
function HSP.updateCurrentState() local state = HSP.gmcpval("char.status.state") if state ~= nil then HSP.currentState = tonumber(state) or -1 end return HSP.currentState end
function HSP.isInCombat() return HSP.updateCurrentState() == 8 end
-- ============================================================================ -- GMCP Event Handler (replaces OnPluginBroadcast) -- ============================================================================ function HSP.onGMCPCharStatus() if not Spellups["GL"] then return end
if HSP.isInCombat() then hadarprint("In combat (state 8), skipping spellup commands", "debug") return end
if HSP.currentState == 3 and Spellups["GL"]["autoaura"] == "yes" and Spellups["GL"]["autoaurafired"] == "no" then hadarprint("Should be wearing equipment " .. tostring(Spellups["GL"]["float"]), "debug") Spellups["GL"]["autoaurafired"] = "yes" send("wear " .. Spellups["GL"]["float"], false) Spellups["GL"]["sancoff"] = "no" if Spellups["GL"]["aurabag"] ~= 0 then send("put " .. Spellups["GL"]["auranumber"] .. " " .. Spellups["GL"]["aurabag"], false) end end cast_spells() SendSlistCommand()
-- handle disabled state if Spellups["GL"]["SpellsDisabled"] == "yes" then hadarprint("SpellsDisabled == yes", "debug") hadarprint(tostring(Spellups["GL"]["DisabledReason"]), "debug") if Spellups["GL"]["DisabledReason"] == "died" or Spellups["GL"]["DisabledReason"] == "failed" then HSP.currentmana = 0 if Spellups["GL"]["DisabledReason"] == "died" then Spellups["GL"]["DisabledReason"] = "died2" end else return end local mm = HSP.gmcpval("char.maxstats.maxmana") HSP.maxmana = tonumber(mm) or -1 local cm = HSP.gmcpval("char.vitals.mana") HSP.currentmana = tonumber(cm) or 0 local percentage = (HSP.maxmana * Spellups["GL"]["percEnable"] / 100) if HSP.currentmana >= percentage then if Spellups["GL"]["DisabledReason"] == "died2" or Spellups["GL"]["DisabledReason"] == "failed" then hadarprint("trying to recast", "debug") HSPDisable("disablespellsoff") cast_spells() end if Spellups["GL"]["failed"] >= 5 then Spellups["GL"]["failed"] = 0 HSPDisable("disablespellsoff") end end end end
function HSP.onGMCPCharVitals() local cm = HSP.gmcpval("char.vitals.mana") HSP.currentmana = tonumber(cm) or 0 end
function HSP.onGMCPCharMaxstats() local mm = HSP.gmcpval("char.maxstats.maxmana") HSP.maxmana = tonumber(mm) or -1 if HSP.maxmana == nil or HSP.maxmana == -1 then Spellups["EX"]["percentageStop"] = 0 else Spellups["EX"]["percentageStop"] = (HSP.maxmana * Spellups["EX"]["percentage"] / 100) end end
-- ============================================================================ -- buildInitial (adapted) -- ============================================================================ function buildInitial() Spellups["AS"] = Spellups["AS"] or {} Spellups["AS"]["spellup"] = {} Spellups["AS"]["other"] = {} Spellups["AS"]["recovery"] = {} Spellups["AS"]["attack"] = {} Spellups["AS"]["spells"] = {} Spellups["AS"]["skills"] = {} Spellups["AS"]["list"] = {} Spellups["AS"]["namelist"] = {} Spellups["AF"]["list"] = {} Spellups["EX"]["exceptions"] = { [1] = 53, [2] = 211, [3] = 258, [4] = 259, [5] = 335, [6] = 526, [7] = 530 } Spellups["EX"]["noAuto"] = {} Spellups["AS"]["cSkills"] = { ["twinlobe"] = 468, ["watchmen"] = 483, ["seekers"] = 489, ["emerald"] = 492, ["light"] = 463, ["baal"] = 466, ["hook"] = 470, ["bard"] = 505, ["crusader"] = 488, ["xunti"] = 498, ["imperium"] = 479, ["crimson"] = 471, ["retribution"] = 480, ["druid"] = 475, ["amazon"] = 490, ["pyre"] = 485, ["masaki"] = 481, ["rhabdo"] = 486, ["perdition"] = 497, ["loqui"] = 510, ["gaardian"] = 509, ["tao"] = 499, ["touchstone"] = 496, ["boot"] = 606 } end
-- ============================================================================ -- checkExist (adapted) -- ============================================================================ function checkExist(tbl, idx, val) if not Spellups[tbl] then Spellups[tbl] = {} end if Spellups[tbl][idx] == nil then Spellups[tbl][idx] = val HSP.SaveState() end end
-- ============================================================================ -- injectVars (adapted from MUSHclient) -- ============================================================================ function injectVars() local v = {} v["GL"] = {} v["AS"] = {} v["AF"] = {} v["NA"] = {} v["QU"] = {} v["EX"] = {} v["QS"] = {} v["FC"] = {} v["RT"] = {} v["MS"] = {} v["CG"] = {} v["TG"] = {} v["TO"] = {} v["TB"] = {} v["TE"] = {} v["OE"] = {}
v["AS"]["namelist"] = {}
v["GL"]["initilized"] = "no" v["GL"]["Debug"] = "no" v["GL"]["autoaura"] = "no" v["GL"]["smartcast"] = "no" v["GL"]["logo"] = "@G[@CS@cpell@CU@cps@G]@w" v["GL"]["disabled"] = "no" v["GL"]["exceptions"] = "yes" v["GL"]["clan"] = "none" v["GL"]["aurabag"] = 0 v["GL"]["auranumber"] = 0 v["GL"]["autoaurafired"] = "no" v["GL"]["float"] = "none" v["GL"]["sancoff"] = "no" v["GL"]["mainWindow"] = "yes" v["GL"]["commLog"] = "no" v["GL"]["commLogTab"] = nil v["GL"]["thirtytimer"] = "yes" v["GL"]["tentimer"] = "yes" v["GL"]["seespells"] = "yes" v["GL"]["failed"] = 0 v["GL"]["mudsidespellup"] = 1 v["GL"]["died"] = 0 v["GL"]["SpellsDisabled"] = "no" v["GL"]["DisabledReason"] = "not" v["GL"]["percEnable"] = 70 v["GL"]["Installed"] = os.time() v["GL"]["Date"] = os.date("*t")
v["EX"]["clanskill"] = "none" v["EX"]["clanskillV1"] = -1 v["EX"]["Timer"] = {} v["EX"]["thirtytimer"] = {} v["EX"]["tentimer"] = {} v["EX"]["wraithform"] = {} v["EX"]["cooldown"] = {} v["EX"]["percentage"] = 0 v["EX"]["percentageStop"] = 0
v["RT"]["reverse"] = {} v["RT"]["allrecoveries"] = {} v["RT"]["affectedrecovery"] = {}
v["MS"]["logo"] = "@G[@CS@cpellup@G]@c" v["MS"]["thirty"] = "${logo} ${spell} is going to fall in 30 seconds" v["MS"]["ten"] = "${logo} ${spell} is going to fall in 10 seconds" v["MS"]["channel"] = "echo"
v["CG"]["spellstorecast"] = 10 v["CG"]["elementward"] = 0 v["CG"]["elementfocus"] = 0 v["CG"]["gaiasfocus"] = 0
v["TG"]["totemcast"] = 0 v["TG"]["totemcastauto"] = "no" v["TG"]["totemcomm"] = "no" v["TG"]["totemalivemsg"] = "${logo} @G${type}@c totem has been erected" v["TG"]["totemdeadmsg"] = "${logo} @C${type}@c totem has fallen" v["TG"]["totemrecovermsg"] = "${logo}@c You may now erect a new totem!" v["TG"]["totemWarningThirty"] = "${logo} ${spell} will recover in 30 seconds" v["TG"]["totemWarningTen"] = "${logo} @G${spell}@c will recover in 10 seconds" v["TG"]["totemAttacked"] = "${logo} @G${type} has been attacked by @R${player}" v["TG"]["totemPKed"] = "${logo} @G${type} has been Killed by @R${player}" v["TG"]["TotemAttackedNum"] = 0 v["TG"]["TotemPKedNum"] = 0 v["TG"]["totemtype"] = "no"
v["TO"]["StartTime"] = 0 v["TO"]["year"] = 0; v["TO"]["month"] = 0; v["TO"]["day"] = 0 v["TO"]["hour"] = 0; v["TO"]["min"] = 0; v["TO"]["sec"] = 0 v["TO"]["TotalYears"] = 0; v["TO"]["TotalMonths"] = 0; v["TO"]["TotalDays"] = 0 v["TO"]["TotalHours"] = 0; v["TO"]["TotalMinutes"] = 0; v["TO"]["TotalSeconds"] = 0 v["TO"]["TotalCast"] = 0; v["TO"]["Killed"] = 0 v["TO"]["TotemUp"] = "${logo} @G${type}@c totem has been erected" v["TO"]["TotemDown"] = "${logo} @C${type}@c totem has fallen"
v["TB"]["StartTime"] = 0 v["TB"]["year"] = 0; v["TB"]["month"] = 0; v["TB"]["day"] = 0 v["TB"]["hour"] = 0; v["TB"]["min"] = 0; v["TB"]["sec"] = 0 v["TB"]["TotalYears"] = 0; v["TB"]["TotalMonths"] = 0; v["TB"]["TotalDays"] = 0 v["TB"]["TotalHours"] = 0; v["TB"]["TotalMinutes"] = 0; v["TB"]["TotalSeconds"] = 0 v["TB"]["TotalCast"] = 0; v["TB"]["Killed"] = 0 v["TB"]["TotemUp"] = "${logo} @G${type}@c totem has been erected" v["TB"]["TotemDown"] = "${logo} @C${type}@c totem has fallen"
v["TE"]["StartTime"] = 0 v["TE"]["year"] = 0; v["TE"]["month"] = 0; v["TE"]["day"] = 0 v["TE"]["hour"] = 0; v["TE"]["min"] = 0; v["TE"]["sec"] = 0 v["TE"]["TotalYears"] = 0; v["TE"]["TotalMonths"] = 0; v["TE"]["TotalDays"] = 0 v["TE"]["TotalHours"] = 0; v["TE"]["TotalMinutes"] = 0; v["TE"]["TotalSeconds"] = 0 v["TE"]["TotalCast"] = 0; v["TE"]["Killed"] = 0 v["TE"]["TotemUp"] = "${logo} @G${type}@c totem has been erected" v["TE"]["TotemDown"] = "${logo} @C${type}@c totem has fallen"
v["OE"]["oracleComm"] = "yes" v["OE"]["message"] = "${logo} ${msg}" v["OE"]["logo"] = "@W-@C{@GE@gye@C}@W-@c" v["OE"]["messageUp"] = "${logo} Eye is now up in ${area}" v["OE"]["messageReCast"] = "${logo} Eye is now ready to recast" v["OE"]["messageDown"] = "${logo} Eye has fallen from ${area}" v["OE"]["messageDismissed"] = "${logo} Eye has been dismised from ${area}" v["OE"]["zone"] = 0 v["OE"]["Prophecy"] = 0
for a, b in pairs(v) do for c, d in pairs(b) do checkExist(a, c, d) end end end
-- ============================================================================ -- HSPTimeDiff (adapted) -- ============================================================================ function HSPTimeDiff(t2, t1, script) local d1, d2, carry, diff = os.date('*t', t1), os.date('*t', t2), false, {} local colMax = {60, 60, 24, os.date('*t', os.time{year=d1.year, month=d1.month+1, day=0}).day, 12} d2.hour = d2.hour - (d2.isdst and 1 or 0) + (d1.isdst and 1 or 0) for i, v in ipairs({'sec', 'min', 'hour', 'day', 'month', 'year'}) do diff[v] = d2[v] - d1[v] + (carry and -1 or 0) carry = diff[v] < 0 if carry then diff[v] = diff[v] + colMax[i] end end for i, v in pairs(diff) do Spellups[script][i] = v end return diff end
-- ============================================================================ -- SendSlistCommand (adapted) -- ============================================================================ function SendSlistCommand() if HSP.isInCombat() then hadarprint("In combat (state 8), postponing slist command", "debug") return end
if (HSP.slistCommandSent == false) then HSP.slistCommandSent = true enableTrigger("HSPListStart") enableTrigger("HSPListEnd") enableTrigger("HSPListCapture") enableTrigger("HSPRecoveriesStart") hadarprint("***Getting Skills/Spells", "script") send("slist hsp", false) end end
-- ============================================================================ -- HSP_stop_sList (adapted) -- ============================================================================ function HSP_stop_sList() disableTrigger("HSPListStart") disableTrigger("HSPListEnd") disableTrigger("HSPListCapture") HSP.SaveState() hadarprint("***Got all skills/spells", "script") end
-- ============================================================================ -- SlistUpdate (adapted - called from HSPListCapture trigger) -- matches: [2]=sn, [3]=nm, [4]=tg, [5]=du, [6]=pc, [7]=rc, [8]=ty -- ============================================================================ function SlistUpdate() local sn = tonumber(matches[2]) local nm = matches[3] local tg = tonumber(matches[4]) local du = tonumber(matches[5]) local pc = tonumber(matches[6]) local rc = tonumber(matches[7]) local ty = tonumber(matches[8])
Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn] = {name = nm, target = tg, duration = du, prac = pc, recovery = rc, type = ty} local nm2 = nm:gsub(" ", "_") Spellups["AS"]["namelist"][nm2] = {skillnum = sn}
if tg == 2 or tg == 3 then Spellups["AS"]["spellup"][sn] = nm end if sn == 414 then Spellups["AS"]["spellup"][sn] = nm end if tg == 5 then Spellups["AS"]["other"][sn] = nm end if rc ~= -1 and tg == 2 then Spellups["AS"]["recovery"][sn] = nm end if tg == 1 then Spellups["AS"]["attack"][sn] = nm end if sn == 574 then Spellups["AS"]["attack"][sn] = nm end if sn == 285 then Spellups["AS"]["attack"][sn] = nm end if ty == 1 then Spellups["AS"]["spells"][sn] = nm elseif ty == 2 then Spellups["AS"]["skills"][sn] = nm end
if rc ~= -1 then Spellups["RT"]["allrecoveries"][rc] = {skillnum = sn, name = nm, duration = du, type = ty, target = tg} end
if rc ~= -1 and pc > 1 then hadarprint("SN:" .. sn .. ", NM:" .. nm .. ", TG:" .. tg .. ", DU:" .. du .. ", PC:" .. pc .. ", RC:" .. rc .. ", TY:" .. ty, "debug") Spellups["RT"][rc] = {skillnum = sn, name = nm, duration = du, type = ty, target = tg} Spellups["RT"]["reverse"][sn] = {recovery = rc}
if not HSP.pastFirstInstall then table.insert(Spellups["EX"]["Timer"], sn) Spellups["EX"]["thirtytimer"][sn] = "yes" Spellups["EX"]["tentimer"][sn] = "yes" end end end
-- ============================================================================ -- Main command handler: HSPmain (adapted) -- ============================================================================ function HSPmain() local input = matches[2] or "" local first, rest = input:match("(%w+)%s*(.*)")
if first == nil then HadarHelp() return end
first = string.lower(first)
if first == "testshow" then testshow(rest) elseif first == "debug" then setdebug() elseif first == "disable" then HSPDisable(rest) elseif first == "noauto" then noAutoList(rest) elseif first == "reload" then HSPreload() elseif first == "autoaura" then autoaura(rest) elseif first == "aura" then hspWearAura() elseif first == "channel" then hspSetChannel(rest) elseif first == "set" then hspSet(rest) elseif first == "report" then hspWindow(rest) elseif first == "seespells" or first == "seespell" then hspToggleSeeSpells() elseif first == "totem" then hspsettotem(rest) elseif first == "elementalfocus" then hspsetelementalfocus(rest) elseif first == "elementalward" then hspsetelementalward(rest) elseif first == "combat" then hspsetcombat(rest) elseif first == "timer" then hspdotimerexception(rest) elseif first == "fullspellupreset" then HSP.pastFirstInstall = false HSP.slistCommandSent = false HSP.OnPluginEnable() elseif first == "wraith" then hspsetwraith(rest) elseif first == "gaiasfocus" then hspsetgaiasfocus(rest) elseif first == "prophecy" then hspsetprophecy(rest) elseif first == "help" then HadarHelp(rest) elseif first == "percent" then hspsetpercent(rest) elseif first == "cskill" then hspshowcskill(rest) elseif first == "setingame" then hspsetingame(rest) elseif first == "death" then hspdiedtoggle(rest) elseif first == "eye" then hspEyeStuff(rest) else HadarHelp("nadda") end end
function HSU() -- placeholder end
-- ============================================================================ -- setdebug (adapted) -- ============================================================================ function setdebug() if Spellups["GL"]["Debug"] == "yes" then Spellups["GL"]["Debug"] = "no" hadarprint("Debug set to @ROFF@w", "script") else Spellups["GL"]["Debug"] = "yes" hadarprint("Debug set to @GON@w", "script") end end
function testshow(arg) local zone = HSP.gmcpval("room.info.zone") echo(tostring(zone) .. "\n") end
-- ============================================================================ -- invmon (adapted) -- ============================================================================ function invmon() local action = tonumber(matches[2]) local id = tonumber(matches[3]) local loc = tonumber(matches[4]) if action == 1 and loc == 27 then if tonumber(Spellups["GL"]["auranumber"]) ~= id then Spellups["GL"]["float"] = id end end end
-- ============================================================================ -- affon (adapted) -- ============================================================================ function affon() local sn = tonumber(matches[2]) local tm = tonumber(matches[3])
if Spellups["GL"]["disabled"] == "yes" then return end
if contains(Spellups["EX"]["Timer"], sn) then hadarprint("fired on lookup for timer", "debug") recoveryup(sn, tm) end
Spellups["AF"]["list"][sn] = tm Spellups["NA"][sn] = 0 hadarprint("Affected by:" .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["name"] .. " Time:" .. tm, "debug")
if Spellups["QS"] == nil then hadarprint("function affon, spellups[qs]==nil", "debug") return else hadarprint("setting nil to " .. sn, "debug") Spellups["QS"][sn] = nil end
if Spellups["GL"]["failed"] > 0 then Spellups["GL"]["failed"] = 0 end end
-- ============================================================================ -- affoff (adapted) -- ============================================================================ function affoff() local sn = tonumber(matches[2]) local wraithcastable = false local wraithcounted = 0
if Spellups["GL"]["disabled"] == "yes" then Spellups["AF"]["list"][sn] = nil return end
if sn == 121 then Spellups["QS"][sn] = Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["name"] end
if sn == 180 then for i, v in pairs(Spellups["EX"]["wraithform"]) do if table.find(v, Spellups["AF"]["list"]) then -- left empty intentionally else local ctype = tonumber(Spellups["AS"]["list"][v]["type"]) Spellups["QS"][v] = Spellups["AS"]["list"][v]["name"] cast_spells() end end end
if table.find(Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["recovery"], Spellups["RT"]["affectedrecovery"]) ~= nil then hadarprint("affected by recovery:" .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["name"] .. " not recasting", "debug") return end
local subclass = HSP.gmcpval("char.base.subclass") local playerTier = tonumber(HSP.gmcpval("char.base.tier")) or -1 local playerLevel = tonumber(HSP.gmcpval("char.base.level")) or -1 local totalLevel = tonumber(playerLevel + playerTier)
if subclass == "Priest" then if totalLevel >= 121 then if sn == 71 then hadarprint("Sanc off and level >= 121, and a priest! we are recasting party sanc!", "debug") local castline = "cast 'party sanctuary'" if Spellups["GL"]["seespells"] == "yes" then send(castline) else send(castline, false) end return end end end
if Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["target"] == 2 or Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["target"] == 3 or sn == Spellups["EX"]["clanskill"] or sn == Spellups["EX"]["clanskillV1"] or sn == 569 then if HSP.currentState == 8 then if sn == 71 or sn == 102 or sn == 180 then if sn == 71 or sn == 102 then Spellups["GL"]["sancoff"] = "yes" hadarprint("sancoff = yes", "debug") if Spellups["GL"]["autoaura"] == "yes" then affoffautoaura() end Spellups["QS"][sn] = Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["name"] end hadarprint("CS = 8, autoaura = on, sn = 71 or 108 or 180", "debug") if sn == 180 then Spellups["QS"][sn] = Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["name"] end return end end if Spellups["QS"] == nil then Spellups["QS"] = {} end Spellups["QS"][sn] = Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["name"] Spellups["NA"][sn] = 1 hadarprint("adding to queue (affoff): " .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["name"], "debug") end
cast_spells() end
-- ============================================================================ -- affoffautoaura (adapted) -- ============================================================================ function affoffautoaura() if Spellups["GL"]["auranumber"] ~= 0 then hadarprint("autoaura not 0", "debug") if Spellups["GL"]["aurabag"] ~= 0 then hadarprint("aurabag not 0", "debug") send("get " .. Spellups["GL"]["auranumber"] .. " " .. Spellups["GL"]["aurabag"]) send("wear " .. Spellups["GL"]["auranumber"]) else hadarprint("aura bag not set leaving in inventory", "debug") send("wear " .. Spellups["GL"]["auranumber"]) end Spellups["GL"]["autoaurafired"] = "no" end end
-- ============================================================================ -- sfail (adapted) -- matches: [2]=sn, [3]=tg, [4]=fl, [5]=rc -- ============================================================================ function sfail() local sn = tonumber(matches[2]) local tg = matches[3] local fl = tonumber(matches[4]) local rc = tonumber(matches[5])
hadarprint("Spell failed! SN:" .. sn .. ", TG:" .. tg .. ", FL:" .. fl, "debug")
if Spellups["GL"]["disabled"] == "yes" then return end
if table.find(sn, Spellups["AS"]["spellup"]) == nil then hadarprint("That is not a spellup spell/skill, not registering", "debug") return else hadarprint("Found spellup skill/spell that failed" .. sn, "debug") end
if fl == 4 then Spellups["GL"]["failed"] = Spellups["GL"]["failed"] + 1 if tonumber(Spellups["GL"]["failed"]) > 5 then HSPDisable("disablespellson") hadarprint("HSP Turned off due to mana issues - failed 5 spells, please restore mana above 70% to reenable or type hsp disable", "script") return else Spellups["QS"][sn] = Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["name"] end end
if fl == 3 then Spellups["QS"][sn] = nil return end
if fl == 6 then -- auto aura placeholder end
if fl == 1 or fl == 6 then hadarprint("FL 1 or 6!", "debug") if sn == 414 then local castline = "cast '" .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["name"] .. "'" if Spellups["GL"]["seespells"] == "yes" then send(castline) else send(castline, false) end return end if sn == 121 then Spellups["QS"][sn] = Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["name"] end if table.find(sn, Spellups["AS"]["spellup"]) ~= nil then Spellups["QS"][sn] = Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["name"] hadarprint("failed and found in spellup", "debug") end cast_spells() end end
-- ============================================================================ -- cast_spells (adapted) -- ============================================================================ function cast_spells() if HSP.isInCombat() then hadarprint("In combat (state 8), skipping spell casts", "debug") return end hadarprint("We are attempting to cast_spells", "debug") if Spellups["GL"]["disabled"] == "yes" then hadarprint("cast_spells disabled == yes", "debug") return end if HSP.currentmana == nil or HSP.currentmana == -1 then -- left blank elseif Spellups["EX"]["percentageStop"] >= HSP.currentmana then hadarprint("We are in percentage stop area", "debug") return end if Spellups["QS"] == nil then hadarprint("QS == nil", "debug") return end
for i, v in pairs(Spellups["QS"]) do local ctype = tonumber(Spellups["AS"]["list"][i]["type"])
if HSP.currentState ~= 8 then if tonumber(Spellups["GL"]["mudsidespellup"]) == 1 then if table.count(Spellups["QS"]) >= tonumber(Spellups["CG"]["spellstorecast"]) then hadarprint("doing a mudside spellup", "debug") if table.find(Spellups["EX"]["clanskill"], Spellups["QS"]) ~= nil then hadarprint("Contains Cskill", "debug") cast_this(Spellups["EX"]["clanskill"], tonumber(Spellups["AS"]["list"][Spellups["EX"]["clanskill"]]["type"])) end if table.find(Spellups["EX"]["clanskillV1"], Spellups["QS"]) ~= nil then hadarprint("Contains V1 Cskill", "debug") cast_this(Spellups["EX"]["clanskillV1"], tonumber(Spellups["AS"]["list"][Spellups["EX"]["clanskillV1"]]["type"])) end send("spellup", false) Spellups["QS"] = {} break end end if contains(Spellups["EX"]["noAuto"], i) == false then if Spellups["AS"]["list"][i]["prac"] > 1 or i == Spellups["EX"]["clanskill"] or i == Spellups["EX"]["clanskillV1"] then cast_this(i, ctype) else Spellups["QS"][i] = nil end else hadarprint(Spellups["AS"]["list"][i]["name"] .. " is noauto, removing", "debug") Spellups["QS"][i] = nil end end end end
-- ============================================================================ -- cast_this (adapted) -- ============================================================================ function cast_this(sn, ctype) if Spellups["GL"]["SpellsDisabled"] == "yes" then if ctype == 1 then return end end Spellups["QS"][sn] = nil hadarprint("casting:" .. sn, "debug") local castline = nil
if sn == 526 then castline = "cast '" .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["name"] .. "' " .. Spellups["CG"]["elementfocus"] elseif sn == 530 then castline = "cast '" .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["name"] .. "' " .. Spellups["CG"]["elementward"] elseif sn == 477 then castline = "cast '" .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["name"] .. "' " .. Spellups["OE"]["Prophecy"] elseif ctype == 1 then castline = "cast '" .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["name"] .. "'" elseif sn == 226 and ctype == 2 then castline = "trace" elseif ctype == 2 then local t = HSP.split(Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["name"], " ", 2) castline = t[1] end
if castline ~= nil then if Spellups["GL"]["seespells"] == "yes" then send(castline) else send(castline, false) end end end
-- ============================================================================ -- HSPDisable (adapted) -- ============================================================================ function HSPDisable(arg, reason) hadarprint("HSPdisable fired reason == " .. tostring(Spellups["GL"]["DisabledReason"]), "debug")
if string.lower(arg) == "check" then if Spellups["GL"]["disabled"] == "yes" then hadarprint("Spellup Autocast is currently @RDISABLED@c for@w:@R " .. Spellups["GL"]["DisabledReason"], "script") elseif Spellups["GL"]["disabled"] == "no" then hadarprint("Spellup Autocast is currently @GENABLED@w", "script") end elseif string.lower(arg) == "silentoff" then Spellups["GL"]["disabled"] = "yes" hadarprint("Spells disabled turning to yes", "debug") elseif string.lower(arg) == "silenton" then Spellups["GL"]["disabled"] = "no" Spellups["GL"]["DisabledReason"] = "enabled" hadarprint("Spells disabled turning to no", "debug") elseif string.lower(arg) == "crowley" then hadarprint("@B[@RMelvin@B]@C Well I mean there is no point in doing that ...@w") elseif string.lower(arg) == "disablespellson" then Spellups["GL"]["SpellsDisabled"] = "yes" Spellups["GL"]["DisabledReason"] = "failed" hadarprint("Spellsdisabled turning to yes", "debug") elseif string.lower(arg) == "disablespellsoff" then Spellups["GL"]["SpellsDisabled"] = "no" hadarprint("Spellsdisabled turning to no", "debug") else if Spellups["GL"]["disabled"] == "yes" then Spellups["GL"]["disabled"] = "no" Spellups["GL"]["SpellsDisabled"] = "no" Spellups["GL"]["DisabledReason"] = "Manual" hadarprint("Autocast set to @GON@w", "script") elseif Spellups["GL"]["disabled"] == "no" then Spellups["GL"]["disabled"] = "yes" Spellups["GL"]["SpellsDisabled"] = "yes" Spellups["GL"]["DisabledReason"] = "Manual" hadarprint("Spellup Autocast set to @ROFF@w", "script") end end end
-- ============================================================================ -- Remaining adapted functions (keeping close to original) -- ============================================================================
function hspsetingame(str) local first, rest = str:match("([0-9.a-zA-Z]*)%s*(.*)") local arg = string.lower(first) or "help" local thing = tonumber(rest) or string.lower(rest)
if arg == "on" then Spellups["GL"]["mudsidespellup"] = 1 hadarprint("@CIn game spellup turned @GON@C will recast after@W:@R" .. Spellups["CG"]["spellstorecast"], "script") elseif arg == "off" then Spellups["GL"]["mudsidespellup"] = 0 hadarprint("@CIn game spellup turned @ROFF@C", "script") elseif arg == "toggle" then if Spellups["GL"]["mudsidespellup"] == 1 then Spellups["GL"]["mudsidespellup"] = 0 hadarprint("@CIn game spellup turned @ROFF@C", "script") else Spellups["GL"]["mudsidespellup"] = 1 hadarprint("@CIn game spellup turned @GON@C will recast after@W:@R" .. Spellups["CG"]["spellstorecast"], "script") end elseif arg == "set" then if type(thing) == "number" then Spellups["CG"]["spellstorecast"] = thing hadarprint("@CIn game spellups set to when @R" .. thing .. "@C spells fall.@w", "script") else hadarprint("@CCurrent number of spells set to fall is:@R " .. Spellups["CG"]["spellstorecast"], "script") end else hadarprint("@CCurrent number of spells set to fall is:@R " .. Spellups["CG"]["spellstorecast"], "script") end end
function hspWearAura() if Spellups["GL"]["auranumber"] == 0 then hadarprint("You will need to set an aura number use command @Ghsp autoaura aura <number>@w", "error") hadarprint("also if you have not set the bag you can do so with @Ghsp autoaura bag <number>@w", "error") else if Spellups["GL"]["aurabag"] ~= 0 then send("get " .. Spellups["GL"]["auranumber"] .. " " .. Spellups["GL"]["aurabag"]) send("wear " .. Spellups["GL"]["auranumber"]) else send("wear " .. Spellups["GL"]["auranumber"]) end end end
function autoaura(str) local first, rest = str:match("([0-9.a-zA-Z]*)%s*(.*)") local arg = string.lower(first) if arg == "aura" then auraset(rest) elseif arg == "bag" then aurasetbag(rest) elseif arg == "on" then auraseton() elseif arg == "off" then aurasetoff() end end
function auraseton() if Spellups["GL"]["autoaura"] == "no" then if Spellups["GL"]["auranumber"] == 0 then hadarprint("Auto aura @RNOT@c turned on", "script") hadarprint("You will need to set an aura number use command @Ghsp autoaura aura <number>@w", "error") else Spellups["GL"]["autoaura"] = "yes" hadarprint("Auto aura set to @GON", "script") end else hadarprint("Auto aura already set to on, please use @Ghsp autoaura off", "error") end end
function aurasetoff() if Spellups["GL"]["autoaura"] == "yes" then Spellups["GL"]["autoaura"] = "no" hadarprint("Auto aura set to @ROFF", "script") else hadarprint("Auto aura already set to off, please use @Ghsp autoaura on", "error") end end
function auraset(arg) local thing = tonumber(arg) or string.lower(arg or "") if type(thing) == "number" then Spellups["GL"]["auranumber"] = thing hadarprint("Aura set to: " .. Spellups["GL"]["auranumber"], "script") return end hadarprint("Please provide a number: hsp autoaura aura <number>", "error") end
function aurasetbag(arg) local val = tonumber(arg) if val then Spellups["GL"]["aurabag"] = val hadarprint("Aura bag set to: " .. Spellups["GL"]["aurabag"], "script") else hadarprint("Please provide a number: hsp autoaura bag <number>", "error") end end
function noAutoList(sn) sn = tonumber(sn) or string.lower(sn or "") if type(sn) == "number" then if table.find(sn, Spellups["AS"]["list"]) ~= nil then if contains(Spellups["EX"]["noAuto"], sn) then hadarprint("Removing " .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["name"] .. " from the NOAUTO list", "script") remove(Spellups["EX"]["noAuto"], sn) else hadarprint("Adding " .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["name"] .. " to the NOAUTO list", "script") table.insert(Spellups["EX"]["noAuto"], sn) end else hadarprint("Please input a valid SN", "error") end elseif sn ~= "" and table.find(sn, Spellups["AS"]["namelist"]) ~= nil then local sname = tonumber(Spellups["AS"]["namelist"][sn]["skillnum"]) if contains(Spellups["EX"]["noAuto"], sname) then hadarprint("Removing " .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][sname]["name"] .. " from the NOAUTO list", "script") remove(Spellups["EX"]["noAuto"], sname) else hadarprint("Adding " .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][sname]["name"] .. " to the NOAUTO list", "script") table.insert(Spellups["EX"]["noAuto"], sname) end elseif sn == "clear" then Spellups["EX"]["noAuto"] = {} hadarprint("Your list of no cast spells has been cleared.", "script") else hadarprint("@W+@x086--------------@G[@CN@co @CA@cuto @CC@cast @CS@cpells@G]@x086-------------@W+@w") hadarprint("@W| @CS@cpell @CN@cumber @W| @CS@cpell @Cn@came @W|@w") hadarprint("@W+@x086------------------------------------------------@W+@w") if Spellups["EX"]["noAuto"][1] == nil then hadarprint("@W|@c No Spells are set to not autocast @W|@w") hadarprint("@W|@c to set a spell use hsp noauto <number> @W|@w") end for i, v in pairs(Spellups["EX"]["noAuto"]) do local numbersize = 24 - string.len(tostring(v)) local numberpad1 = math.ceil(numbersize / 2) local numberpad2 = math.floor(numbersize / 2) local shownumber = string.rep(" ", numberpad1) .. v .. string.rep(" ", numberpad2) local wordsize = 23 - string.len(Spellups["AS"]["list"][tonumber(v)]["name"]) local wordpad1 = math.ceil(wordsize / 2) local wordpad2 = math.floor(wordsize / 2) local showword = string.rep(" ", wordpad1) .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][tonumber(v)]["name"] .. string.rep(" ", wordpad2) hadarprint("@W|@c" .. shownumber .. "@W|@c" .. showword .. "@W|@w") end hadarprint("@W+@x086------------------------------------------------@W+@w") end end
function make_vis() hadarprint("Letting you go visible", "script") disableAlias("do_vis") if Spellups["GL"]["disabled"] == "yes" then enableAlias("do_vis") return end HSPDisable("silentoff") send("vis", false) enableAlias("do_vis") tempTimer(1, function() expandAlias("hsp disable silenton") end) end
function make_land() if Spellups["GL"]["disabled"] == "yes" then return end hadarprint("Letting you land", "script") disableAlias("do_land") HSPDisable("silentoff") send("land", false) enableAlias("do_land") tempTimer(1, function() expandAlias("hsp disable silenton") end) end
function HSPreload() hadarprint("Reloading Spellup plugin", "script") HSP.slistCommandSent = false SendSlistCommand() end
function recoveryup(sn, timer) hadarprint("SN:" .. sn .. ", TIMER:" .. timer, "debug") local sn = tonumber(sn) local tm = tonumber(timer) local uptime1 = tm - 30 local uptime2 = tm - 10 local firstwarn = "warn_30_" .. sn local secondwarn = "warn_10_" .. sn
local remaining1 = uptime1 % 86400 local hours1 = math.floor(remaining1 / 3600) remaining1 = remaining1 % 3600 local minutes1 = math.floor(remaining1 / 60) remaining1 = remaining1 % 60 local seconds1 = remaining1
local remaining2 = uptime2 % 86400 local hours2 = math.floor(remaining2 / 3600) remaining2 = remaining2 % 3600 local minutes2 = math.floor(remaining2 / 60) remaining2 = remaining2 % 60 local seconds2 = remaining2
if Spellups["EX"]["thirtytimer"][sn] == "yes" then hadarprint("Added 30 timer for: " .. firstwarn, "debug") HSP.AddNamedTimer(firstwarn, hours1, minutes1, seconds1, "rcwarning") end if Spellups["EX"]["tentimer"][sn] == "yes" then hadarprint("Added 10 timer for: " .. secondwarn, "debug") HSP.AddNamedTimer(secondwarn, hours2, minutes2, seconds2, "rcwarning") end end
function recoveryupTotem(sn, timer) hadarprint("SN:" .. sn .. ", TIMER:" .. timer, "debug") local sn = tonumber(sn) local tm = tonumber(timer) local uptime1 = tm - 30 local uptime2 = tm - 10 local uptime3 = tm - 150 local uptime4 = tm - 130 local firstwarn = "warn_30_" .. sn local secondwarn = "warn_10_" .. sn local thirdwarn = "totem_30_" .. sn local fourthwarn = "totem_10_" .. sn
local function splitTime(t) local r = t % 86400 local h = math.floor(r / 3600); r = r % 3600 local m = math.floor(r / 60); r = r % 60 return h, m, r end
local h1, m1, s1 = splitTime(uptime1) local h2, m2, s2 = splitTime(uptime2) local h3, m3, s3 = splitTime(uptime3) local h4, m4, s4 = splitTime(uptime4)
if Spellups["EX"]["thirtytimer"][sn] == "yes" then HSP.AddNamedTimer(thirdwarn, h1, m1, s1, "rcwarning") HSP.AddNamedTimer(firstwarn, h3, m3, s3, "rcwarning") end if Spellups["EX"]["tentimer"][sn] == "yes" then HSP.AddNamedTimer(fourthwarn, h2, m2, s2, "rcwarning") HSP.AddNamedTimer(secondwarn, h4, m4, s4, "rcwarning") end end
function recon() local sn = tonumber(matches[2]) local tm = tonumber(matches[3]) Spellups["RT"]["affectedrecovery"][sn] = tm hadarprint("Recovery on:" .. Spellups["RT"][sn]["name"] .. "(" .. sn .. ")" .. " For:" .. tm, "debug") if sn == 65 then recoveryupTotem(624, tm) elseif sn == 66 then eyeRecovery() end end
function recoff() local sn = tonumber(matches[2]) local skillnum = Spellups["RT"][sn]["skillnum"] local skilltype = Spellups["RT"][sn]["type"] local skillname = Spellups["RT"][sn]["name"]
if Spellups["RT"]["affectedrecovery"][sn] ~= nil then if Spellups["AF"]["list"][skillnum] ~= nil then if tonumber(Spellups["AF"]["list"][skillnum]) >= tonumber(Spellups["RT"]["affectedrecovery"][sn]) then Spellups["RT"]["affectedrecovery"][sn] = nil return end end end
Spellups["RT"]["affectedrecovery"][sn] = nil
if sn == 65 then totemrecovery() else if table.find(skillnum, Spellups["AS"]["attack"]) == nil then hadarprint("recasting:" .. skillname, "debug") Spellups["QS"][skillnum] = Spellups["AS"]["list"][skillnum]["name"] hadarprint("adding to queue (recovery off): " .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][skillnum]["name"], "debug") end cast_spells() end end
function rcwarning(arg) local t = HSP.split(arg, "_") local nm = Spellups["AS"]["list"][tonumber(t[3])]["name"] local message
hadarprint("1:" .. t[1] .. " 2:" .. t[2] .. " 3:" .. t[3] .. " nm:" .. nm, "debug")
if t[1] == "totem" and t[2] == "30" then message = interp(Spellups["TG"]["totemWarningThirty"], {logo = Spellups["MS"]["logo"], spell = nm}) elseif t[1] == "totem" and t[2] == "10" then message = interp(Spellups["TG"]["totemWarningTen"], {logo = Spellups["MS"]["logo"], spell = nm}) elseif t[2] == "30" then message = interp(Spellups["MS"]["thirty"], {logo = Spellups["MS"]["logo"], spell = nm}) elseif t[2] == "10" then message = interp(Spellups["MS"]["ten"], {logo = Spellups["MS"]["logo"], spell = nm}) else message = "danger will robinson i dont know how i got here!" end
if message ~= nil then if Spellups["GL"]["mainWindow"] == "yes" then if Spellups["MS"]["channel"] == "echo" or Spellups["MS"]["channel"] == "print" then hadarprint(message) else send(Spellups["MS"]["channel"] .. " " .. message .. "@w") end end if Spellups["GL"]["commLog"] == "yes" then -- CommLog integration: raise event for external comm log plugin raiseEvent("HSP_CommLog", message, Spellups["GL"]["commLogTab"] or "SpellTracker") end if Spellups["GL"]["commLog"] == "no" and Spellups["GL"]["mainWindow"] == "no" then hadarprint("You have both reporting to Comm log and reporting to main window off, cant report", "error") end end end
function hspSet(param) param = string.lower(param) if param == "30" then hadarprint("Current 30 second message: " .. Spellups["MS"]["thirty"], "script") hadarprint("To change, use: hsp set thirty <message> (use ${logo} and ${spell} variables)", "script") elseif param == "10" then hadarprint("Current 10 second message: " .. Spellups["MS"]["ten"], "script") hadarprint("To change, use: hsp set ten <message> (use ${logo} and ${spell} variables)", "script") elseif param == "logo" then hadarprint("Current logo: " .. Spellups["MS"]["logo"], "script") hadarprint("To change, use: hsp set logo <message>", "script") else hadarprint("@cYou need to input one of the following@w: @Glogo@w, @G30@w,@G 10@w @C.@c.@C. @YEG:@R hsp set 10@w", "error") end HSP.SaveState() end
function hspSetChannel(str) if str ~= nil and str ~= "" and str ~= " " then Spellups["MS"]["channel"] = str hadarprint("Default channel set to@w: @G" .. Spellups["MS"]["channel"], "script") else hadarprint("Current Channel:" .. Spellups["MS"]["channel"], "script") hadarprint("@cPlease use the following command@W:@Ghsp channel <channel you want to output to>@w", "error") end HSP.SaveState() end
function hspWindow(str) if str == nil or str == "" or str == " " then hadarprint("@cYou need to give an argument EG: @Ghsp report main", "error") return end local first, second = str:match("(%w+)%s*(.*)") first = string.lower(first) if second == " " or second == "" then second = nil end
if first == "main" and second == nil then if Spellups["GL"]["mainWindow"] == "yes" then Spellups["GL"]["mainWindow"] = "no" hadarprint("You will @RNOT @creport spellup info to the main window", "script") else Spellups["GL"]["mainWindow"] = "yes" hadarprint("You @GWILL@c report spellup info to the main window", "script") end elseif first == "main" and second == "on" then Spellups["GL"]["mainWindow"] = "yes" hadarprint("You @GWILL@c report spellup info to the main window", "script") elseif first == "main" and second == "off" then Spellups["GL"]["mainWindow"] = "no" hadarprint("You will @RNOT @creport spellup info to the main window", "script") elseif first == "comm" and second == nil then if Spellups["GL"]["commLog"] == "yes" then Spellups["GL"]["commLog"] = "no" hadarprint("You will @RNOT @creport spellup info to the comm window", "script") else Spellups["GL"]["commLog"] = "yes" hadarprint("You @GWILL@c report spellup info to the comm window", "script") end elseif first == "comm" and second == "on" then Spellups["GL"]["commLog"] = "yes" hadarprint("You @GWILL@c report spellup info to the main window", "script") elseif first == "comm" and second == "off" then Spellups["GL"]["commLog"] = "no" hadarprint("You will @RNOT @creport spellup info to the main window", "script") end
if second ~= nil and second ~= "on" and second ~= "off" then Spellups["GL"]["commLogTab"] = second hadarprint("You will now report spellup info to the @W" .. second .. "@w communication log", "script") end HSP.SaveState() end
function hspToggleSeeSpells() if Spellups["GL"]["seespells"] == "yes" then Spellups["GL"]["seespells"] = "no" hadarprint("Seeing the recast message @RDISABLED@w", "script") else Spellups["GL"]["seespells"] = "yes" hadarprint("Seeing the recast message @GENABLED@w", "script") end
-- Persist immediately so toggles survive Mudlet restarts/reloads HSP.SaveState() end
-- ============================================================================ -- Totem functions (adapted) -- ============================================================================ function totemattack() local pname = matches[2] local message = interp(Spellups["TG"]["totemAttacked"], {logo = Spellups["MS"]["logo"], type = Spellups["TG"]["totemtype"], player = pname}) Spellups["TG"]["TotemAttackedNum"] = Spellups["TG"]["TotemAttackedNum"] + 1 if Spellups["GL"]["mainWindow"] == "yes" then if Spellups["MS"]["channel"] == "echo" or Spellups["MS"]["channel"] == "print" then hadarprint(message) else send(Spellups["MS"]["channel"] .. " " .. message .. "@w") end end if Spellups["TG"]["totemcomm"] == "yes" then raiseEvent("HSP_CommLog", message, Spellups["GL"]["commLogTab"] or "SpellTracker") end end
function totemkilled() local pname = matches[2] local message = interp(Spellups["TG"]["totemPKed"], {logo = Spellups["MS"]["logo"], type = Spellups["TG"]["totemtype"], player = pname}) Spellups["TG"]["TotemPKedNum"] = Spellups["TG"]["TotemPKedNum"] + 1 HSP.DeleteNamedTimer("warn_30_624") HSP.DeleteNamedTimer("warn_10_624")
if Spellups["TG"]["totemtype"] == "owl" then Spellups["TO"]["Killed"] = Spellups["TO"]["Killed"] + 1 HSPTimeDiff(os.time(), Spellups["TO"]["StartTime"], "TO") elseif Spellups["TG"]["totemtype"] == "ent" then Spellups["TE"]["Killed"] = Spellups["TE"]["Killed"] + 1 HSPTimeDiff(os.time(), Spellups["TE"]["StartTime"], "TE") elseif Spellups["TG"]["totemtype"] == "bear" then Spellups["TB"]["Killed"] = Spellups["TB"]["Killed"] + 1 HSPTimeDiff(os.time(), Spellups["TB"]["StartTime"], "TB") end
if Spellups["GL"]["mainWindow"] == "yes" then if Spellups["MS"]["channel"] == "echo" or Spellups["MS"]["channel"] == "print" then hadarprint(message) else send(Spellups["MS"]["channel"] .. " " .. message .. "@w") end end if Spellups["TG"]["totemcomm"] == "yes" then raiseEvent("HSP_CommLog", message, Spellups["GL"]["commLogTab"] or "SpellTracker") end Spellups["TG"]["totemtype"] = "none" end
function totemalive() Spellups["TG"]["totemtype"] = matches[2] local totem = string.lower(Spellups["TG"]["totemtype"]) local message
if totem == "owl" then message = interp(Spellups["TO"]["TotemUp"], {logo = Spellups["MS"]["logo"], type = Spellups["TG"]["totemtype"]}) Spellups["TO"]["TotalCast"] = Spellups["TO"]["TotalCast"] + 1 Spellups["TO"]["StartTime"] = os.time() elseif totem == "bear" then message = interp(Spellups["TB"]["TotemUp"], {logo = Spellups["MS"]["logo"], type = Spellups["TG"]["totemtype"]}) Spellups["TB"]["TotalCast"] = Spellups["TB"]["TotalCast"] + 1 Spellups["TB"]["StartTime"] = os.time() elseif totem == "ent" then message = interp(Spellups["TE"]["TotemUp"], {logo = Spellups["MS"]["logo"], type = Spellups["TG"]["totemtype"]}) Spellups["TE"]["TotalCast"] = Spellups["TE"]["TotalCast"] + 1 Spellups["TE"]["StartTime"] = os.time() else message = interp(Spellups["TG"]["totemalivemsg"], {logo = Spellups["MS"]["logo"], type = "Unknown"}) end
if Spellups["GL"]["mainWindow"] == "yes" then if Spellups["MS"]["channel"] == "echo" or Spellups["MS"]["channel"] == "print" then hadarprint(message) else send(Spellups["MS"]["channel"] .. " " .. message .. "@w") end end if Spellups["TG"]["totemcomm"] == "yes" then raiseEvent("HSP_CommLog", message, Spellups["GL"]["commLogTab"] or "SpellTracker") end end
function totemdead() local totem = string.lower(Spellups["TG"]["totemtype"]) local message
if totem == "owl" then message = interp(Spellups["TO"]["TotemDown"], {logo = Spellups["MS"]["logo"], type = Spellups["TG"]["totemtype"]}) HSPTimeDiff(os.time(), Spellups["TO"]["StartTime"], "TO") elseif totem == "bear" then message = interp(Spellups["TB"]["TotemDown"], {logo = Spellups["MS"]["logo"], type = Spellups["TG"]["totemtype"]}) HSPTimeDiff(os.time(), Spellups["TB"]["StartTime"], "TB") elseif totem == "ent" then message = interp(Spellups["TE"]["TotemDown"], {logo = Spellups["MS"]["logo"], type = Spellups["TG"]["totemtype"]}) HSPTimeDiff(os.time(), Spellups["TE"]["StartTime"], "TE") else message = interp(Spellups["TG"]["totemdeadmsg"], {logo = Spellups["MS"]["logo"], type = "Unknown"}) end
if Spellups["GL"]["mainWindow"] == "yes" then if Spellups["MS"]["channel"] == "echo" or Spellups["MS"]["channel"] == "print" then hadarprint(message) else send(Spellups["MS"]["channel"] .. " " .. message .. "@w") end end if Spellups["TG"]["totemcomm"] == "yes" then raiseEvent("HSP_CommLog", message, Spellups["GL"]["commLogTab"] or "SpellTracker") end Spellups["TG"]["totemtype"] = "None" end
function totemrecovery() local message = interp(Spellups["TG"]["totemrecovermsg"], {logo = Spellups["MS"]["logo"], type = Spellups["TG"]["totemtype"]}) if Spellups["GL"]["mainWindow"] == "yes" then if Spellups["MS"]["channel"] == "echo" or Spellups["MS"]["channel"] == "print" then hadarprint(message) else send(Spellups["MS"]["channel"] .. " " .. message .. "@w") end end if Spellups["TG"]["totemcomm"] == "yes" then raiseEvent("HSP_CommLog", message, Spellups["GL"]["commLogTab"] or "SpellTracker") end if Spellups["TG"]["totemcastauto"] == "yes" then if Spellups["GL"]["seespells"] == "yes" then send("cast 'gaias totem' " .. Spellups["TG"]["totemcast"]) else send("cast 'gaias totem' " .. Spellups["TG"]["totemcast"], false) end end end
function hspsettotem(str) local arg, rest = str:match("([0-9.a-zA-Z]*)%s*(.*)") local rawRest = rest or "" arg = string.lower(arg) if rest and rest ~= "" and rest ~= " " then rest = string.lower(rest) end
if arg == "bear" then Spellups["TG"]["totemcast"] = "bear" hadarprint("When able you will Attempt to cast @GBear@c totem@w", "script") elseif arg == "owl" then Spellups["TG"]["totemcast"] = "owl" hadarprint("When able you will Attempt to cast @GOwl@c totem@w", "script") elseif arg == "ent" then Spellups["TG"]["totemcast"] = "ent" hadarprint("When able you will cast @GEnt@c totem@w", "script") elseif arg == "autocast" then if Spellups["TG"]["totemcastauto"] == "yes" then Spellups["TG"]["totemcastauto"] = "no" hadarprint("You will no longer attempt to cast a totem when ready", "script") else Spellups["TG"]["totemcastauto"] = "yes" hadarprint("You will now attempt to cast a totem when ready, remember to set the totem!", "script") end elseif arg == "commlog" then if Spellups["TG"]["totemcomm"] == "yes" then Spellups["TG"]["totemcomm"] = "no" hadarprint("You will @RNO LONGER@c send totem messages to commlog", "script") else Spellups["TG"]["totemcomm"] = "yes" hadarprint("You will @GNOW@c send totem messages to commlog", "script") end elseif arg == "set" then local option, message = rawRest:match("([0-9.a-zA-Z]+)%s*(.*)") option = string.lower(option or "") message = message or "" if message == "" then hadarprint("@cYou need to input one of the following@w: @Galive@w, @Gdead@w, @Grecover@w, @Gowlup@w, @Gowldown@w, @Gentup@w, @Gentdown@w, @Gbearup@w, @Gbeardown@w, @Gattacked@w, @Gkilled@w. @YEG:@R hsp totem set alive <message>@w", "error") return end
local function setMessage(section, key, label) local backup = Spellups[section][key] Spellups[section][key] = message if Spellups[section][key] ~= nil then hadarprint("the " .. label .. " message will look like@W: @w" .. Spellups[section][key], "script") else Spellups[section][key] = backup end end
if option == "alive" then setMessage("TG", "totemalivemsg", "totem alive") elseif option == "dead" then setMessage("TG", "totemdeadmsg", "totem alive") elseif option == "recover" then setMessage("TG", "totemrecovermsg", "totem alive") elseif option == "owlup" then setMessage("TO", "TotemUp", "Owl Cast") elseif option == "owldown" then setMessage("TO", "TotemDown", "Owl Fallen") elseif option == "entup" then setMessage("TE", "TotemUp", "Ent Cast") elseif option == "entdown" then setMessage("TE", "TotemDown", "Ent Fallen") elseif option == "bearup" then setMessage("TB", "TotemUp", "Bear Cast") elseif option == "beardown" then setMessage("TB", "TotemDown", "Bear fallen") elseif option == "attacked" then setMessage("TG", "totemAttacked", "totem attacked") elseif option == "killed" then setMessage("TG", "totemPKed", "totem killed") else hadarprint("@cYou need to input one of the following@w: @Galive@w, @Gdead@w, @Grecover@w, @Gowlup@w, @Gowldown@w, @Gentup@w, @Gentdown@w, @Gbearup@w, @Gbeardown@w, @Gattacked@w, @Gkilled@w. @YEG:@R hsp totem set alive <message>@w", "error") end else local configAutocastString local configAutoCastType local configCommLog if Spellups["TG"]["totemcastauto"] == "yes" then configAutocastString = " @Gtrue@w " else configAutocastString = " @Rfalse@W " end if Spellups["TG"]["totemcast"] == "owl" then configAutoCastType = " @x227owl@W " elseif Spellups["TG"]["totemcast"] == "ent" then configAutoCastType = " @X130ent@W " elseif Spellups["TG"]["totemcast"] == "bear" then configAutoCastType = " @x240bear@W " else configAutoCastType = " @RNone@W " end if Spellups["TG"]["totemcomm"] == "yes" then configCommLog = " @Gtrue@W " else configCommLog = " @Rfalse@W " end
local totemalive = interp(Spellups["TG"]["totemalivemsg"], {logo = Spellups["MS"]["logo"], type = "<Bear/Owl/Ent>"}) local totemdead = interp(Spellups["TG"]["totemdeadmsg"], {logo = Spellups["MS"]["logo"], type = "<Bear/Owl/Ent>"}) local totemrecover = interp(Spellups["TG"]["totemrecovermsg"], {logo = Spellups["MS"]["logo"], type = "<Bear/Owl/Ent>"}) local totemattacked = interp(Spellups["TG"]["totemAttacked"], {logo = Spellups["MS"]["logo"], type = "<Bear/Owl/Ent>", player = "<Player name>"}) local totemkilled = interp(Spellups["TG"]["totemPKed"], {logo = Spellups["MS"]["logo"], type = "<Bear/Owl/Ent>", player = "<Player name>"})
local totemaliveowl = interp(Spellups["TO"]["TotemUp"], {logo = Spellups["MS"]["logo"], type = "Owl"}) local totemalivebear = interp(Spellups["TB"]["TotemUp"], {logo = Spellups["MS"]["logo"], type = "Bear"}) local totemaliveent = interp(Spellups["TE"]["TotemUp"], {logo = Spellups["MS"]["logo"], type = "Ent"})
local totemdeadowl = interp(Spellups["TO"]["TotemDown"], {logo = Spellups["MS"]["logo"], type = "Owl"}) local totemdeadbear = interp(Spellups["TB"]["TotemDown"], {logo = Spellups["MS"]["logo"], type = "Bear"}) local totemdeadent = interp(Spellups["TE"]["TotemDown"], {logo = Spellups["MS"]["logo"], type = "Ent"})
hadarprint("@W+@x086--------------------@G[@CT@cotems@G]@x086-------------------@W+@w", "helpfile") hadarprint("@W| @CO@cption @W| @CC@config @W|@w", "helpfile") hadarprint("@W+@x086-----------------------------------------------@W+@w", "helpfile") hadarprint("@W| @CA@cuto@CC@cast @W|" .. configAutocastString .. "|@w", "helpfile") hadarprint("@W| @CA@cuto@CC@cast @CT@cype @W|" .. configAutoCastType .. "|@w", "helpfile") hadarprint("@W| @CC@comm @CL@cog @W|" .. configCommLog .. "|@w", "helpfile") hadarprint("@W+@x086-----------------------------------------------@W+@w", "helpfile") hadarprint("") hadarprint("@CT@cotem @CM@cessages@W:@w", "helpfile") hadarprint("@W-----------------------------------------------@w", "helpfile") hadarprint("@CT@cotem @CA@clive@W:@w", "helpfile") hadarprint(totemalive .. "@w") hadarprint("@W-----------------------------------------------@w", "helpfile") hadarprint("@CT@cotem @CD@cead@W:@w", "helpfile") hadarprint(totemdead .. "@w") hadarprint("@W-----------------------------------------------@w", "helpfile") hadarprint("@CT@cotem @CR@cecover@W:@w", "helpfile") hadarprint(totemrecover .. "@w") hadarprint("@W-----------------------------------------------@w", "helpfile") hadarprint("@CT@cotem @CA@cttacked@W:@w", "helpfile") hadarprint(totemattacked .. "@w") hadarprint("@W-----------------------------------------------@w", "helpfile") hadarprint("@CT@cotem @CK@cilled@W:@w", "helpfile") hadarprint(totemkilled .. "@w") hadarprint("@W-----------------------------------------------@w", "helpfile") hadarprint("@CT@cotem @CO@cwl@W:@w") hadarprint("@CU@cp@W:@w" .. totemaliveowl) hadarprint("@CD@cown@W:@w" .. totemdeadowl) hadarprint("") hadarprint("@CT@cotem @CB@cear@W:@w") hadarprint("@CU@cp@W:@w" .. totemalivebear) hadarprint("@CD@cown@W:@w" .. totemdeadbear) hadarprint("") hadarprint("@CT@cotem @CE@cnt@W:@w") hadarprint("@CU@cp@W:@w" .. totemaliveent) hadarprint("@CD@cown@W:@w" .. totemdeadent) end end
function hspsetelementalfocus(str) local arg = str:match("([0-9.a-zA-Z]*)"):lower() if arg == "earth" or arg == "air" or arg == "fire" or arg == "water" then Spellups["CG"]["elementfocus"] = arg hadarprint("Elemental @rfocus@c set to: @G" .. Spellups["CG"]["elementfocus"], "script") else hadarprint("You need to enter which element you want to cast @CEarth@c, @CAir@c, @CFire@c, @CWater @C... @GEG hsp elementalfocus fire@w", "script") end end
function hspsetelementalward(str) local arg = str:match("([0-9.a-zA-Z]*)"):lower() if arg == "earth" or arg == "air" or arg == "fire" or arg == "water" then Spellups["CG"]["elementward"] = arg hadarprint("Elemental @Cward@c set to: @G" .. Spellups["CG"]["elementward"], "script") else hadarprint("You need to enter which element you want to cast @CEarth@c, @CAir@c, @CFire@c, @CWater @C... @GEG hsp elementalward fire@w", "script") end end
function hspsetgaiasfocus(str) local arg = str:match("([0-9.a-zA-Z]*)"):lower() if arg == "random" or arg == "none" then Spellups["CG"]["gaiasfocus"] = 0 hadarprint("Gaia's @Cfocus@c set to: @GRandom", "script") return end if arg == "earth" or arg == "air" or arg == "cold" or arg == "water" or arg == "electric" then Spellups["CG"]["gaiasfocus"] = arg hadarprint("Gaias @Cfocus@c set to: @G" .. Spellups["CG"]["gaiasfocus"], "script") else hadarprint("Gaias focus set to: @G" .. tostring(Spellups["CG"]["gaiasfocus"]), "script") hadarprint("Enter which element: @Cearth@c, @Cair@c, @Ccold@c, @Cwater@c, @Celectric@c, or @Crandom", "script") end end
function hspsetprophecy(str) local arg = str:match("([0-9.a-zA-Z]*)"):lower() if arg == "intuition" or arg == "cognition" or arg == "evasion" then Spellups["OE"]["Prophecy"] = arg hadarprint("Prophecy's @rForesight@c set to: @G" .. Spellups["OE"]["Prophecy"], "script") else hadarprint("You need to enter which foresight: @CIntuition@c, @CCognition@c, @CEvasion@c @C... @GEG hsp Prophecy Intuition@w", "script") end end
function hspdied() if tonumber(Spellups["GL"]["died"]) == 1 then if Spellups["GL"]["disabled"] == "no" then HSPDisable("disablespellson") Spellups["GL"]["DisabledReason"] = "died" HSP.currentState = 11 hadarprint("Do to an untimely demise, HSP has been disabled", "script") end end end
function hspdiedtoggle(str) local first, rest = str:match("([0-9.a-zA-Z]*)%s*(.*)") local arg = string.lower(first or "toggle")
if arg == "toggle" or arg == "" then if tonumber(Spellups["GL"]["died"]) == 1 then Spellups["GL"]["died"] = 0 hadarprint("Spells will be autocast when you die", "script") else Spellups["GL"]["died"] = 1 hadarprint("Spells will NOT autocast when you die", "script") end elseif arg == "on" then Spellups["GL"]["died"] = 1 hadarprint("Spells will NOT autocast when you die", "script") elseif arg == "off" then Spellups["GL"]["died"] = 0 hadarprint("Spells will be autocast when you die", "script") elseif arg == "perc" or arg == "percent" then local num = tonumber(rest) if num then if HSP.maxmana == nil or HSP.maxmana == -1 then hadarprint("mana variable not set", "error") return end Spellups["GL"]["percEnable"] = num local mana = (HSP.maxmana * Spellups["GL"]["percEnable"] / 100) hadarprint("Set autocast resume after death to @G" .. Spellups["GL"]["percEnable"] .. "@c% which is " .. mana .. " mana", "script") end end end
function hspskillgain() local sn = tonumber(matches[2]) local pc = tonumber(matches[3]) Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["prac"] = pc end
function hspdotimerexception(str) local arg, rest = str:match("([0-9.a-zA-Z]*)%s*(.*)") arg = tonumber(arg) or string.lower(arg or "") local nm2 if arg ~= nil and arg ~= "" and arg ~= " " and type(arg) == "string" then nm2 = arg:gsub(" ", "_") end
if type(arg) == "number" then if table.find(arg, Spellups["AS"]["list"]) ~= nil then if contains(Spellups["EX"]["Timer"], arg) then hadarprint("Removing " .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][arg]["name"] .. " from the timers list", "script") remove(Spellups["EX"]["Timer"], arg) Spellups["EX"]["thirtytimer"][arg] = "no" Spellups["EX"]["tentimer"][arg] = "no" else hadarprint("Adding " .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][arg]["name"] .. " to the timers list", "script") table.insert(Spellups["EX"]["Timer"], arg) Spellups["EX"]["thirtytimer"][arg] = "yes" Spellups["EX"]["tentimer"][arg] = "yes" end else hadarprint("Please enter a valid SN", "error") end elseif arg == "set" then addorremovetimers(rest) elseif nm2 and table.find(nm2, Spellups["AS"]["namelist"]) ~= nil then local sn = tonumber(Spellups["AS"]["namelist"][nm2]["skillnum"]) if contains(Spellups["EX"]["Timer"], sn) then hadarprint("Removing " .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["name"] .. " from the timers list", "script") remove(Spellups["EX"]["Timer"], sn) Spellups["EX"]["thirtytimer"][sn] = "no" Spellups["EX"]["tentimer"][sn] = "no" else hadarprint("Adding " .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["name"] .. " to the timers list", "script") table.insert(Spellups["EX"]["Timer"], sn) Spellups["EX"]["thirtytimer"][sn] = "yes" Spellups["EX"]["tentimer"][sn] = "yes" end else -- Show timer list hadarprint("@W+@x086---------@G[@CT@cimers @CE@cxceptions@G]@x086--------@W+@w") hadarprint("@W| @CS@cpell @CN@cumber @W| @CS@cpell @Cn@came @W| @CT@cimers @W|@w") hadarprint("@W+@x086--------------------------------------------------------------------------@W+@w") if Spellups["EX"]["Timer"][1] == nil then hadarprint("@W|@c No Spells are set to have a timer @W|@w") end for i, v in pairs(Spellups["EX"]["Timer"]) do local nm = Spellups["AS"]["list"][tonumber(v)] and Spellups["AS"]["list"][tonumber(v)]["name"] or "?" local t30 = Spellups["EX"]["thirtytimer"][v] == "yes" local t10 = Spellups["EX"]["tentimer"][v] == "yes" local ts = "" if t30 and t10 then ts = "@G30@W,@G10" elseif t30 then ts = "@G30" elseif t10 then ts = "@g10" else ts = "@Rnone" end hadarprint("@W|@c " .. v .. " @W|@c " .. nm .. " @W|@c " .. ts .. " @W|@w") end hadarprint("@W+@x086--------------------------------------------------------------------------@W+@w") end end
function addorremovetimers(str) local arg, rest = str:match("([0-9.a-zA-Z]*)%s*(.*)") arg = tonumber(arg) or string.lower(arg or "") rest = tonumber(rest) or string.lower(rest or "")
if type(arg) == "string" then local nm2 = arg:gsub(" ", "_") if table.find(nm2, Spellups["AS"]["namelist"]) ~= nil then arg = tonumber(Spellups["AS"]["namelist"][nm2]["skillnum"]) else hadarprint("Expected name or SN", "script") return end end if type(rest) ~= "number" then hadarprint("Expected number (10 or 30)", "script") return end if rest == 10 then if Spellups["EX"]["tentimer"][arg] == "yes" then Spellups["EX"]["tentimer"][arg] = "no" hadarprint("10 second timer @RDISABLED@c for " .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][arg]["name"], "script") else Spellups["EX"]["tentimer"][arg] = "yes" hadarprint("10 second timer @GENABLED@c for " .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][arg]["name"], "script") end end if rest == 30 then if Spellups["EX"]["thirtytimer"][arg] == "yes" then Spellups["EX"]["thirtytimer"][arg] = "no" hadarprint("30 second timer @RDISABLED@c for " .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][arg]["name"], "script") else Spellups["EX"]["thirtytimer"][arg] = "yes" hadarprint("30 second timer @GENABLED@c for " .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][arg]["name"], "script") end end end
function hspsetcombat(str) local arg, rest = str:match("([0-9.a-zA-Z]*)%s*(.*)") arg = tonumber(arg) or string.lower(arg or "") local nm2 if arg ~= nil and arg ~= "" and arg ~= " " and type(arg) == "string" then nm2 = arg:gsub(" ", "_") end
if type(arg) == "number" then if table.find(arg, Spellups["AS"]["list"]) ~= nil then if contains(Spellups["EX"]["exceptions"], arg) then hadarprint("Removing " .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][arg]["name"] .. " from the exceptions list", "script") remove(Spellups["EX"]["exceptions"], arg) else hadarprint("Adding " .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][arg]["name"] .. " to the exceptions list", "script") table.insert(Spellups["EX"]["exceptions"], arg) end else hadarprint("Please enter a valid SN", "error") end elseif nm2 and table.find(nm2, Spellups["AS"]["namelist"]) ~= nil then local sn = tonumber(Spellups["AS"]["namelist"][nm2]["skillnum"]) if contains(Spellups["EX"]["exceptions"], sn) then hadarprint("Removing " .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["name"] .. " from the exceptions list", "script") remove(Spellups["EX"]["exceptions"], sn) else hadarprint("Adding " .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["name"] .. " to the exceptions list", "script") table.insert(Spellups["EX"]["exceptions"], sn) end else hadarprint("@W+@x086---------------@G[@CC@combat @CE@cxceptions@G]@x086--------------@W+@w") hadarprint("@W| @CS@cpell @CN@cumber @W| @CS@cpell @Cn@came @W|@w") hadarprint("@W+@x086------------------------------------------------@W+@w") if Spellups["EX"]["exceptions"][1] == nil then hadarprint("@W|@c No Spells are set to cast in combat @W|@w") end for i, v in pairs(Spellups["EX"]["exceptions"]) do local nm = Spellups["AS"]["list"][tonumber(v)] and Spellups["AS"]["list"][tonumber(v)]["name"] or "?" hadarprint("@W|@c " .. v .. " @W|@c " .. nm .. " @W|@w") end hadarprint("@W+@x086------------------------------------------------@W+@w") end end
function hspsetwraith(str) local arg, rest = str:match("([0-9.a-zA-Z]*)%s*(.*)") arg = tonumber(arg) or string.lower(arg or "") local nm2 if arg ~= nil and arg ~= "" and arg ~= " " and type(arg) == "string" then nm2 = arg:gsub(" ", "_") end
if type(arg) == "number" then if table.find(arg, Spellups["AS"]["list"]) ~= nil then if contains(Spellups["EX"]["wraithform"], arg) then hadarprint("Removing " .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][arg]["name"] .. " from the wraith form list", "script") remove(Spellups["EX"]["wraithform"], arg) else hadarprint("Adding " .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][arg]["name"] .. " to the wraith form list", "script") table.insert(Spellups["EX"]["wraithform"], arg) end else hadarprint("Please enter a valid SN", "error") end elseif nm2 and table.find(nm2, Spellups["AS"]["namelist"]) ~= nil then local sn = tonumber(Spellups["AS"]["namelist"][nm2]["skillnum"]) if contains(Spellups["EX"]["wraithform"], sn) then hadarprint("Removing " .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["name"] .. " from the wraith form list", "script") remove(Spellups["EX"]["wraithform"], sn) else hadarprint("Adding " .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][sn]["name"] .. " to the wraith form list", "script") table.insert(Spellups["EX"]["wraithform"], sn) end else hadarprint("@W+@x086---------------@G[@CW@craith @CE@cxceptions@G]@x086--------------@W+@w") hadarprint("@W| @CS@cpell @CN@cumber @W| @CS@cpell @Cn@came @W|@w") hadarprint("@W+@x086------------------------------------------------@W+@w") if Spellups["EX"]["wraithform"][1] == nil then hadarprint("@W|@c No Spells are set to cast before wraith form @W|@w") end for i, v in pairs(Spellups["EX"]["wraithform"]) do local nm = Spellups["AS"]["list"][tonumber(v)] and Spellups["AS"]["list"][tonumber(v)]["name"] or "?" hadarprint("@W|@c " .. v .. " @W|@c " .. nm .. " @W|@w") end hadarprint("@W+@x086------------------------------------------------@W+@w") end end
function hspsetpercent(str) local arg = tonumber(str:match("([0-9.a-zA-Z]*)")) if type(arg) == "number" then if HSP.maxmana == nil or HSP.maxmana == -1 then hadarprint("mana variable not set", "error") return end Spellups["EX"]["percentage"] = arg Spellups["EX"]["percentageStop"] = (HSP.maxmana * Spellups["EX"]["percentage"] / 100) hadarprint("Set autocast pause to @G" .. Spellups["EX"]["percentage"] .. "@c% which is " .. Spellups["EX"]["percentageStop"] .. " mana", "script") end end
function hspshowcskill(str) local arg, rest = str:match("([0-9.a-zA-Z]*)%s*(.*)") arg = tonumber(arg) or string.lower(arg or "")
if Spellups["GL"]["clan"] == "none" then local grabmessage = { "You need to be in a clan to do this.", "Buuuuut mom, I wish I had a clan skill!", "Can I haz cskill?", "One day. The day will come, and this command will be useful.", } local rnd = math.random(1, #grabmessage) hadarprint(grabmessage[rnd], "noclan") return end
if arg == "set" and rest ~= nil and rest ~= "" then local nm2 = rest:gsub(" ", "_") if table.find(nm2, Spellups["AS"]["namelist"]) ~= nil then Spellups["EX"]["clanskillV1"] = Spellups["AS"]["namelist"][nm2]["skillnum"] hadarprint("V1 Cskill set to: " .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][Spellups["EX"]["clanskillV1"]]["name"] .. " @C[@G" .. Spellups["EX"]["clanskillV1"] .. "@C]@w", "script") elseif nm2 == "none" then Spellups["EX"]["clanskillV1"] = -1 hadarprint("V1 Cskill set to @Gnone", "script") else hadarprint("Expecting spellname got: " .. rest, "error") end else if Spellups["EX"]["clanskillV1"] ~= -1 then hadarprint("You can disable V1 cskill with @Ghsp cskill set none@w", "script") hadarprint("Current V1 Cskill: " .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][Spellups["EX"]["clanskillV1"]]["name"] .. " @C[@G" .. Spellups["EX"]["clanskillV1"] .. "@C]@w", "script") end hadarprint("Current V2 Cskill: " .. Spellups["AS"]["list"][Spellups["EX"]["clanskill"]]["name"] .. " @C[@G" .. Spellups["EX"]["clanskill"] .. "@C]@w", "script") end end
function hspRemortDisable() hadarprint("Remort Detected, Disabling", "script") Spellups["GL"]["DisabledReason"] = "remort" HSPDisable("silentoff") end
function hspJustRemorted() hadarprint("Congrats on the remort!", "script") hadarprint("Let us make sure everything is all set!", "script") HSP.slistCommandSent = false SendSlistCommand() HSPDisable("silenton") hadarprint("Automatically turned back on!", "script") end
function hspJustClasschanged() hadarprint("Enjoy your new class!", "script") hadarprint("Let us make sure everything is all set!", "script") HSP.slistCommandSent = false SendSlistCommand() end
-- ============================================================================ -- Eye of Vigilance functions (adapted) -- ============================================================================ function eyeTrigger() local msg = matches[2] local message = interp(Spellups["OE"]["message"], {logo = Spellups["OE"]["logo"], msg = msg}) if Spellups["GL"]["mainWindow"] == "yes" then if Spellups["MS"]["channel"] == "echo" or Spellups["MS"]["channel"] == "print" then hadarprint(message) else send(Spellups["MS"]["channel"] .. " " .. message .. "@w") end end if Spellups["OE"]["oracleComm"] == "yes" then raiseEvent("HSP_CommLog", message, Spellups["GL"]["commLogTab"] or "SpellTracker") end end
function eyeGoByeBye() local message = interp(Spellups["OE"]["messageDown"], {logo = Spellups["OE"]["logo"], area = tostring(Spellups["OE"]["zone"])}) if Spellups["GL"]["mainWindow"] == "yes" then if Spellups["MS"]["channel"] == "echo" or Spellups["MS"]["channel"] == "print" then hadarprint(message) else send(Spellups["MS"]["channel"] .. " " .. message .. "@w") end end if Spellups["OE"]["oracleComm"] == "yes" then raiseEvent("HSP_CommLog", message, Spellups["GL"]["commLogTab"] or "SpellTracker") end end
function eyeGoByeByeDismissed() local message = interp(Spellups["OE"]["messageDismissed"], {logo = Spellups["OE"]["logo"], area = tostring(Spellups["OE"]["zone"])}) if Spellups["GL"]["mainWindow"] == "yes" then if Spellups["MS"]["channel"] == "echo" or Spellups["MS"]["channel"] == "print" then hadarprint(message) else send(Spellups["MS"]["channel"] .. " " .. message .. "@w") end end if Spellups["OE"]["oracleComm"] == "yes" then raiseEvent("HSP_CommLog", message, Spellups["GL"]["commLogTab"] or "SpellTracker") end end
function eyeRecovery() Spellups["OE"]["zone"] = HSP.gmcpval("room.info.zone") or 0 local message = interp(Spellups["OE"]["messageReCast"], {logo = Spellups["OE"]["logo"], area = tostring(Spellups["OE"]["zone"])}) if Spellups["GL"]["mainWindow"] == "yes" then if Spellups["MS"]["channel"] == "echo" or Spellups["MS"]["channel"] == "print" then hadarprint(message) else send(Spellups["MS"]["channel"] .. " " .. message .. "@w") end end if Spellups["OE"]["oracleComm"] == "yes" then raiseEvent("HSP_CommLog", message, Spellups["GL"]["commLogTab"] or "SpellTracker") end end
