function hspEyeStuff(str) local arg, rest = str:match("([0-9.a-zA-Z]*)%s*(.*)") local rawRest = rest or "" arg = string.lower(arg or "") if rest and rest ~= "" and rest ~= " " then rest = string.lower(rest) end
if arg == "commlog" then if Spellups["OE"]["oracleComm"] == "yes" then Spellups["OE"]["oracleComm"] = "no" hadarprint("You will @RNO LONGER@c send oracle messages to commlog", "script") else Spellups["OE"]["oracleComm"] = "yes" hadarprint("You will @GNOW@c send oracle messages to commlog", "script") end elseif arg == "set" then local option, message = rawRest:match("([0-9.a-zA-Z]+)%s*(.*)") option = string.lower(option or "") message = message or "" if message == "" then hadarprint("You need to set something EG@W:@w hsp eye set logo <message> @g-- will change the logo@w", "error") return end
local function setMessage(key, label) local backup = Spellups["OE"][key] Spellups["OE"][key] = message if Spellups["OE"][key] ~= nil then hadarprint("the " .. label .. " message will look like@W: @w" .. Spellups["OE"][key], "script") else Spellups["OE"][key] = backup end end
if option == "logo" then setMessage("logo", "Oracle Logo") elseif option == "up" then setMessage("messageReCast", "Oracle eye of vigilance up") elseif option == "down" then setMessage("messageDown", "Oracle eye of vigilance down") elseif option == "dismissed" then setMessage("messageDismissed", "Oracle eye of vigilance dismissed") elseif option == "message" then setMessage("message", "Oracle eye of vigilance") else hadarprint("You need to set something EG@W:@w hsp eye set logo <message> @g-- will change the logo@w", "error") end else local eyemessage = interp(Spellups["OE"]["message"], {logo = Spellups["OE"]["logo"], msg = "<whatever message it shows>(repop or movement)"}) local eyeup = interp(Spellups["OE"]["messageUp"], {logo = Spellups["OE"]["logo"], area = "<area name>"}) local eyedown = interp(Spellups["OE"]["messageDown"], {logo = Spellups["OE"]["logo"], area = "<area name>"}) local eyedismissed = interp(Spellups["OE"]["messageDismissed"], {logo = Spellups["OE"]["logo"], area = "<area name>"})
hadarprint("@CE@cye @CM@cessages@W:", "helpfile") hadarprint("@W-----------------------------------------------", "helpfile") hadarprint("@CE@cye @CL@cogo@W:", "helpfile") hadarprint(Spellups["OE"]["logo"] .. "") hadarprint("@W-----------------------------------------------", "helpfile") hadarprint("@CE@cye @CM@cessage@W:", "helpfile") hadarprint(eyemessage .. "") hadarprint("@W-----------------------------------------------", "helpfile") hadarprint("@CE@cye @CU@cp@W:", "helpfile") hadarprint(eyeup .. "") hadarprint("@W-----------------------------------------------", "helpfile") hadarprint("@CE@cye @CD@cown@W:", "helpfile") hadarprint(eyedown .. "") hadarprint("@W-----------------------------------------------", "helpfile") hadarprint("@CT@cotem @CD@cismissed@W:", "helpfile") hadarprint(eyedismissed .. "") hadarprint("@W-----------------------------------------------", "helpfile") end end

if arg == "combat" then hadarprint("<medium_turquoise>+-------------------------[combat help files]<medium_turquoise>--------------------------+", "helpfile2") hadarprint("<medium_turquoise>| <dark_orange>hsp combat <light_steel_blue>- <dark_orange>no argument shows a table with the spell number and <medium_turquoise>|", "helpfile2") hadarprint("<medium_turquoise>| <dark_orange>the spell -- ============================================================================ -- Plugin Enable (initialization) -- ============================================================================ function HSP.OnPluginEnable() Spellups = Spellups or {} Spellups["GL"] = Spellups["GL"] or {} Spellups["AS"] = Spellups["AS"] or {} Spellups["AF"] = Spellups["AF"] or {} Spellups["NA"] = Spellups["NA"] or {} Spellups["QU"] = Spellups["QU"] or {} Spellups["EX"] = Spellups["EX"] or {} Spellups["QS"] = Spellups["QS"] or {} Spellups["RT"] = Spellups["RT"] or {} Spellups["MS"] = Spellups["MS"] or {} Spellups["CG"] = Spellups["CG"] or {} Spellups["TG"] = Spellups["TG"] or {} Spellups["TO"] = Spellups["TO"] or {} Spellups["TB"] = Spellups["TB"] or {} Spellups["TE"] = Spellups["TE"] or {} Spellups["OE"] = Spellups["OE"] or {}
HSP.pastFirstInstall = HSP.LoadState() if not HSP.pastFirstInstall then hadarprint("@CLooks like this is your first install, Lets get you setup! @Ghsp@C for help", "script") buildInitial() end
local state = HSP.gmcpval("char.status.state") HSP.currentState = state and tonumber(state) or -1 HSP.maxmana = tonumber(HSP.gmcpval("char.maxstats.maxmana")) or -1 HSP.currentmana = tonumber(HSP.gmcpval("char.vitals.mana")) or -1
Spellups["GL"]["clan"] = HSP.gmcpval("char.base.clan") or "none" if Spellups["GL"]["clan"] == "loner" or Spellups["GL"]["clan"] == "outcast" or Spellups["GL"]["clan"] == "exile" then Spellups["GL"]["clan"] = "none" end
injectVars()
if HSP.currentState == 3 then SendSlistCommand() end
if Spellups["GL"]["clan"] ~= "none" and Spellups["GL"]["clan"] ~= "" then Spellups["EX"]["clanskill"] = tonumber(table.find(Spellups["GL"]["clan"], Spellups["AS"]["cSkills"])) or "none" if Spellups["EX"]["clanskill"] == "none" or Spellups["EX"]["clanskill"] == nil then hadarprint("Your Clan skill is not noted, please contact hadar", "error") else local cskill = Spellups["EX"]["clanskill"] local CSkillName = { [468]="Transcend",[483]="Intervention",[489]="Gift",[492]="Exaltation", [463]="Battlefaith",[466]="Daes",[470]="Stupor",[505]="Choreography", [488]="Anoint",[498]="Xochimiqui",[479]="Oath",[471]="Fate", [480]="Vendetta",[475]="Mandrake",[490]="Pride",[485]="Gloom", [481]="Houyou",[486]="Rage",[497]="Redemption",[510]="Conspire", [509]="Espresso",[499]="Qi",[496]="Aggrandize",[606]="Napalm" } hadarprint("Clan skill Set to: @G" .. (CSkillName[cskill] or "Unknown") .. " @C[@G" .. tostring(Spellups["EX"]["clanskill"]) .. "@C]@w", "script") end end
if HSP.maxmana == nil or HSP.maxmana == -1 then Spellups["EX"]["percentageStop"] = 0 else Spellups["EX"]["percentageStop"] = (HSP.maxmana * Spellups["EX"]["percentage"] / 100) end end
-- ============================================================================ -- Plugin Install message -- ============================================================================ function HSP.OnPluginInstall() hadarprint("@YInstalling @c" .. HSP.pluginName .. "@Y version @c" .. HSP.version .. "@Y...", "script") hadarprint("had help (to see all of hadar's plugin helpfiles), or hsp help to just see this one", "script") HSP.OnPluginEnable() end
-- ============================================================================ -- Save on exit -- ============================================================================ function HSP.onSaveProfile() HSP.SaveState() end
-- Initialize on load HSP.OnPluginInstall()

Script.name: HSP_GMCP_Handler
Script.script:
function HSP_GMCP_Handler(event) if not HSP then return end
if event == "gmcp.char.status" and HSP.onGMCPCharStatus then HSP.onGMCPCharStatus() elseif event == "gmcp.char.vitals" and HSP.onGMCPCharVitals then HSP.onGMCPCharVitals() elseif event == "gmcp.char.maxstats" and HSP.onGMCPCharMaxstats then HSP.onGMCPCharMaxstats() elseif event == "sysExitEvent" and HSP.onSaveProfile then HSP.onSaveProfile() end end
function HSP_onGMCP_char_status() HSP_GMCP_Handler("gmcp.char.status") end
function HSP_onGMCP_char_vitals() HSP_GMCP_Handler("gmcp.char.vitals") end
function HSP_onGMCP_char_maxstats() HSP_GMCP_Handler("gmcp.char.maxstats") end
function HSP_onSaveProfile() HSP_GMCP_Handler("sysExitEvent") end
